# Copilot Instructions

## Repository posture
Treat this repository as a governed project workspace, not a casual code repository.

## Content rules
- Do not invent facts.
- Use placeholders when source documents are missing.
- Keep grant, permitting, technical, legal, and financial claims source-bound.
- Preserve PublicLogic intellectual property boundaries.
- Do not create public-facing claims of endorsement, award, emissions reductions, jobs, revenue, or permits unless a cited source is present.
- Use professional municipal and governance-oriented language.
- Prefer markdown tables for trackers and registers.
- Keep all templates reusable, clean, and easy to maintain.

## Working expectations
- Keep site references limited to currently authorized project sites unless written addenda document expansion.
- Record assumptions, risks, and decisions in the governance files rather than burying them in ad hoc notes.
- When adding materials, favor clarity, source discipline, and audit readiness over promotional language.
